name: feed-reels
summary: TikTok-style vertical video feed: paginated query, autoplay-on-visible player, likes. Key-free (Supabase).
postInstall: Requires the Supabase auth from Phase 2.
Apply supabase/0010_feed.sql (posts + post_likes + RLS) → `supabase db reset && supabase test db`.
Videos: store the file in a Supabase Storage bucket (or any https URL) and pass the URL to createPost(). For uploads, add a private bucket + signed URLs (see docs/research/03-supabase-security.md).
Replace src/features/feed/ui/feed-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass; the design adds comments/share/profile overlays onto useFeed.
